---
title: "John Lafin"
image: "john.jpg"
links:
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/john-lafin/"
  - label: Bluesky
    url: "https://bsky.app/profile/johnlafin.bsky.social"
  - label: GitLab
    url: "https://git.biohpc.swmed.edu/s133712"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/lafinj"
output:
  postcards::trestles
---
 
## Bio

I'm a bioinformatics scientist at Bio-Rad Laboratories, where I help develop software to design ddPCR assays. Previousy, I was a computational biologist in the [Strand Lab](https://strandlab.net) at UT Southwestern, where I used single cell and spatial genomics to understand the biology of the normal human lower urinary tract, informing investigations into diseases like cancer and lower urinary tract dysfunction. 

## Education

**The University of Iowa** | Iowa City, IA

Ph.D, Free Radical and Radiation Biology | August 2012 - June 2017

**The University of Texas** | Austin, TX

B.S, Biochemistry | August 2007 - May 2011

## Experience

**Bio-Rad Laboratories** | Bioinformatics Scientist | May 2026 - present

**UT Southwestern** | Resch. Assoc. -> Comp. Biol. | July 2020 - April 2026

**UT Southwestern** | Postdoctoral Researcher | July 2017 - July 2020
